creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
I know it's too soon to call a timeout, but could someone on the Gnome team look at getting this committed? the version bump was to fix a serious issue that have been present in mate-panel for a while, but, after the last portrevision bump, it started causing wcnk-applet to block the startup of other programs. It can leave the system pretty pretty useless. If a mate/gnome program starts before the wnck-applet starts, it is fine, but after than, the program will not start. It just sits there using no CPU time.

Could someone please commit this soon? I lost several hours looking at this and reinstalling ports trying to get a usable system until I saw Martin's report which led to a quick resolution. I don't like seeing other waste time after a set of updated the size f those triggered by the icu update.
